{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Powershell repeatedly executed the same command to add a permissive inbound firewall rule for an application located in a user's AppData directory. The repeated execution of an identical command within a second is unusual.",

    "firewall rule modification",
    "netsh.exe",
    "inbound allow rule",
    "repeated command execution",
    "AppData program path"
  ]
